prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that works like you do.

Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart lamp that syncs with your day.

Paragraph 1: Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar, and the room around you. Morning focus, afternoon balance, evening wind‑down—without touching a dial.

Paragraph 2: Designed for remote work life, it reduces eye strain and keeps you comfortable through long sessions. Set it once and Lumina quietly keeps you in the best light.

Paragraph 3: At $149, it’s the modern desk essential that just works—so you can, too.

Email 1 — Teaser
Subject: Your desk is about to get smarter

Hi there,

Remote work is here to stay, but great lighting hasn’t caught up. We’re about to change that.

Meet Lumina, a smart desk lamp that automatically adapts to your day—time of day, calendar events, and ambient room light all in sync. No switches. No fuss.

We’re launching soon. Want first access and launch perks? Keep an eye on your inbox.

—The Lumina Team


Email 2 — Launch Day
Subject: Lumina is here—light that adapts to your life

Hi there,

Lumina is officially live.

Lumina intelligently adjusts brightness and color temperature based on your schedule and environment. Early meetings feel crisp and focused. Late‑day work feels warm and calm. It’s lighting that simply works, all day long.

Launch price is $149. Get yours today and upgrade the way you work.

[Shop Lumina]

—The Lumina Team


Email 3 — Social Proof + Nudge
Subject: One less thing to think about at your desk

Hi there,

The best tools disappear into your workflow. Lumina does just that.

Remote workers are already saying it makes long days easier on the eyes and helps them stay in a steady rhythm. Because the light follows your day automatically, you can focus on the work—not the lamp.

Ready for light that adapts to you? Lumina is available now for $149.

[Get Lumina]

—The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that adapts to your day. Time of day, calendar events, and ambient light all in sync. $149. Light that just works. #remotework #productivity
2) Morning focus. Afternoon balance. Evening wind‑down. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness so you don’t have to. Now live for $149.

Instagram
1) Your desk light should keep up with your day. Lumina auto‑adjusts brightness + color temp based on time, meetings, and room light. ✨ Remote work, upgraded. $149.
2) Set it once. Forget it forever. Lumina is the smart lamp designed for how you actually work—no more manual tweaks, no more eye strain.

LinkedIn
1) Remote work deserves better lighting. Lumina is a smart desk lamp that adapts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—reducing eye strain and decision fatigue. Now available for $149.
2) Introducing Lumina: light that works like you do. Built for remote teams and home offices, Lumina automates color temperature and brightness so you can stay focused all day.

Hero
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart lamp that syncs with your workday
Subhead: Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—so your desk always feels just right.
CTA: Get Lumina for $149

Features
1) Adapts to your schedule
Lumina reads your calendar to deliver crisp light for focus and warmer tones for wind‑down.

2) Senses the room
Built‑in ambient light detection keeps brightness balanced no matter the room.

3) Reduces eye strain
Smooth transitions and optimized color temperature help you stay comfortable for long sessions.

4) Set it once
No manual adjustments. Lumina quietly keeps your light perfect all day.

Testimonials
[Customer testimonials coming soon]

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to adjust?
Lumina uses time of day, optional calendar integration, and ambient light sensing to set the right brightness and color temperature automatically.

2) Do I need an app to use Lumina?
You can use Lumina out of the box. The optional app enables calendar sync and customization.

3) Will it work with any desk setup?
Yes. Lumina is designed for typical desk sizes and works great in home offices, coworking spaces, and shared rooms.

4) Can I still control the light manually?
Yes. You can override automatic settings any time and save your preferences.

5) What’s the price and what’s included?
Lumina is $149 and includes the lamp, power adapter, and quick‑start guide.

6) What if I work at night or on different schedules?
Lumina adapts to your time zone and can be customized to match your unique routine.

CTA
Light that adapts to your life. Get Lumina for $149 today.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday

Dateline: San Francisco, CA — [Month Day, Year]

San Francisco, CA — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers who want better lighting without the hassle. The Lumina lamp automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting.

“Remote work has changed how we spend our days, but most desk lighting still requires constant manual adjustments,” said [Founder Name], founder of Lumina. “Lumina delivers the right light at the right time—so people can stay focused, comfortable, and productive.”

Lumina is priced at $149 and is available now at [website URL]. Key features include calendar‑aware lighting, built‑in ambient light sensing, and smooth, eye‑friendly transitions throughout the day.

With a modern, warm design built for home offices, Lumina helps reduce eye strain and decision fatigue, allowing users to focus on their work rather than their lighting.

Availability
Lumina is available now for $149 at [website URL].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting for modern work. Built for remote and hybrid teams, Lumina products adapt to your routine to make home offices more comfortable and productive. Learn more at [website URL].

Media Contact
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Website URL]

steps.text:
All files created in the project directory:
- tagline.txt
- hero-copy.txt
- email-sequence.txt
- social-posts.txt
- landing-page.txt
- press-release.txt
